text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: So this is the current extent of my abilities...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I can't afford to be so careless, especially not
after discovering such a flaw in my calculations.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... Perhaps it'd be best if I go back to the
drawing board and start from the ground up.

It'd be a shame if she abandoned all her hard
work, but the choice is ultimately hers.

It'd be a shame if she abandoned all her hard
work, but the choice is ultimately hers.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Thank you. I really appreciate you helping me
with my theories and calculations.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
You're right. The path to success is paved with
failure. Nothing I've done has ever been a waste
of time.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Now, then! First, let's identify the parts of the
strategy that did work. If we do that, then—
choice_data_list: Your next race will end in victory instead!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Yes! I'll do whatever it takes to perfect my
winning equation.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Right! I'll strike the iron while it's hot and rework
my calculations now while my memory of the race
is still fresh.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Let's head back right away... Wait—before we go
back, I need to buy some bananas.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Because the glucose they provide is excellent for
boosting brain function. They're essential for long
brainstorming sessions.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
For the record... I don't want to buy them simply
because I want to eat bananas!

Biwa Hayahide and I grab some bananas from the
supermarket before heading back, and then we
put in some long hours going over race data.
